name: Tata Neu Plus HDFC Bank Credit Card
milestoneBenefits: Domestic lounge access is milestone based from 10-Jun-2025: 1 lounge voucher per calendar quarter on spends of Rs 50,000 or more, up to 4 per year
Renewal fee waived on spending Rs 1 lakh or more in a year before renewal
additionalBenefits: 2% back as NeuCoins on non-EMI spends on Tata Neu and partner Tata Brands
1% back as NeuCoins on non-Tata brand spends and merchant EMI spends
Additional 5% back as NeuCoins on selected categories on Tata Neu App/Website with NeuPass, making up to 7% on Tata Neu
Up to 1% back as NeuCoins on eligible UPI spends from 01-Aug-2024
499 NeuCoins on Tata Neu App as reversal of first year membership fee after first transaction within 30 days of card issuance
NeuCoins can be used for eligible purchases on Tata Neu brands including Air India Express, Bigbasket, Croma, Westside, Tata CLiQ, IHCL, Tata 1MG, Qmin, Titan and Tanishq
Zero cost card liability when reported immediately

selfEmployed: Annual ITR greater than Rs 6 lakh
